jobs.title: Curriculum Manager - Data Science and AI

location.name: Belgium; Portugal; United Kingdom; United States

jobs.content: <p><strong>About DataCamp</strong></p><p>Data and AI skills are critical for thriving today, and DataCamp is the platform that empowers everyone to learn them. We help individuals & teams ship more value through interactive in-browser courses.</p><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Curriculum Manager designs DataCamp's data-and-AI-skills enablement curriculum across the "Learner Product" org.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Data Engineer
jobs.content: <p>DataCamp is reimagining the in-browser code-execution-and-immediate-feedback data model.</p><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Senior Data Engineer owns DataCamp-for-Business enterprise-data-skills-training platform across server-side pipelines.</p>
